creator: nick.hibma@jrc.it
text:
Could you please try with a boot floppy from 3.2-STABLE, available from:

ftp://ftp.jp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/3.2-RELEASE/floppies

If you have a 2.88Mb floppy drive use boot.flp, otherwise use 2
floppies, one with kern.flp and one with mfsroot.flp on it, insert the
one with kern.flp on it first. Then boot.

Thanks for the feedback.

Nick
-- 
Paranoid:
   perl -e 'use strict;' -e ...

ISIS/STA, T.P.270, Joint Research Centre, 21020 Ispra, Italy
